category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Papua New Guinea.

target_market_label.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚（NISIT / ICCC / PPL）
target_market_label.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞（NISIT / ICCC / PPL）

title.en: China-to-Papua New Guinea EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入巴布亚新几内亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入巴布亞紐幾內亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Papua New Guinea NISIT standards coordination, ICCC market oversight, PNG Power Ltd grid connection expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与巴布亚新几内亚NISIT标准协调、ICCC市场监管、PNG Power Ltd并网预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與巴布亞紐幾內亞NISIT標準協調、ICCC市場監管、PNG Power Ltd併網預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Papua New Guinea, the practical gaps are IEC-oriented safety, connector, EMC, and project documentation rather than a confirmed charger-specific whole-unit national certification route. Papua New Guinea uses 240/415 V, 50 Hz supply through PNG Power Ltd and other project power systems, so the frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Public and fleet deployments should expect IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC direction, not North American J1772. GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 chargers need hardware, signaling, and communication redesign before use with IEC 62196 / CCS2 vehicles or networks.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入巴布亚新几内亚时，实务差距主要是IEC体系安全、接口、EMC和项目文件，而不是已确认的充电桩整机专门国家认证路径。巴布亚新几内亚由PNG Power Ltd及项目供电系统提供240/415 V、50 Hz供电，频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。公共和车队部署应按IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流方向准备，而非北美J1772方向。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930充电桩在用于IEC 62196 / CCS2车辆或网络前，需要进行硬件、信号和通信改造。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入巴布亞紐幾內亞時，實務差距主要是IEC體系安全、接口、EMC和項目文件，而不是已確認的充電樁整機專門國家認證路徑。巴布亞紐幾內亞由PNG Power Ltd及項目供電系統提供240/415 V、50 Hz供電，頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。公共和車隊部署應按IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流方向準備，而非北美J1772方向。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930充電樁在用於IEC 62196 / CCS2車輛或網絡前，需要進行硬體、信號和通訊改造。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NISIT scope determination, ICCC clearance, PNG Power connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, fleet operators, mining and LNG projects, network operators, and installers should verify current Papua New Guinea requirements with qualified local professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NISIT适用范围裁定、ICCC许可、PNG Power并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、车队运营商、矿业和LNG项目、网络运营商及安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格当地专业人士核验现行巴布亚新几内亚要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NISIT適用範圍裁定、ICCC許可、PNG Power併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、車隊運營商、礦業和LNG項目、網絡運營商及安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格當地專業人士核驗現行巴布亞紐幾內亞要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
